validationModal.title: Excel Validation
validationModal.subtitle: Validation Results
validationModal.description: Review issues before uploading to ensure smooth submission.
validationModal.loadingHint: Please wait while we validate the Excel file. Results will appear in this window.
validationModal.emptyMessage: Upload Excel files to generate validation results.
validationModal.noIssuesDetails: Your Excel files look clean. You can proceed with uploading and submission.
validationModal.actionHint: Fix the items below and re-validate before uploading. Ensure required fields are filled, inspection dates are valid, and asset usage IDs match the allowed list.
validationModal.footerHint: Close this panel after reviewing the issues.
validationModal.footerContinueHint: Continue to Step 2 (optional report info), then Step 3 (optional PDF), and finally Step 4 action.

step2.title: Step 2 (Optional): Edit report information
step2.subtitle: You can update important report fields, or skip this optional step.
step2.fixValidationFirst: Fix validation issues first, then choose one of the action buttons below.
step2.actionHint: Step 4: Choose how to continue with the uploaded reports.

pdfSection.title: Step 3: Attach PDF files (optional)
pdfSection.subtitle: You can upload matching PDF files now, or skip and use the placeholder PDF automatically.
pdfSection.usePlaceholderHint: Skip manual PDF upload and use the bundled placeholder file.
pdfSection.uploadPdfsHint: Upload PDF files with names matching the Excel filenames.
pdfSection.matchWarning: Some PDF filenames do not match Excel filenames.
pdfSection.matchSuccess: All selected PDF files match Excel filenames.

status.uploadPrompt: Upload an Excel file to validate.
status.hasIssues: You have issues in excel sheet.
status.clean: No issues, you can upload it now.

message.validWithPdfs: All Excel files look valid and PDFs are matched. You can Upload & Create Reports.
message.validWithoutPdfs: All Excel files look valid. PDFs will use {{placeholder}}. You can Upload & Create Reports.
message.issuesFound: Validation found issues. Fix them to enable Upload & Create Reports.

issues.finalValueWholeNumber: final_value must be a whole number (no decimals).
issues.invalidInspectionDate: inspection_date is not a valid date.
issues.inspectionDateFuture: inspection_date cannot be in the future.
issues.invalidAssetUsageForAsset: asset_usage_id must be one of: {{allowed}} for asset {{asset}}
issues.costFinalValueInteger: final_value must be a whole number (no decimals) for asset {{asset}}.
issues.costFinalValuePositive: final_value must be greater than 0 for asset {{asset}}.
issues.marketFinalValueInteger: final_value must be a whole number (no decimals) for asset {{asset}}.
issues.marketFinalValuePositive: final_value must be greater than 0 for asset {{asset}}.
issues.missingSheets: Excel must contain at least one of 'market' or 'cost' sheets.
issues.noAssetsFound: No assets found in market or cost sheets.
issues.noMatchingPdf: No matching PDF found for Excel {{file}} (match by filename).

error.network: Network error. Make sure the backend server is running and reachable.

error.validationIssues: Please fix validation issues before uploading.
